visual: From a shoulder-width stance, weight transfers slowly side to side between the legs, hips settling into each side without the upper body bobbing.
motion_description: The motion begins in a broad shoulder-width stance with the weight continuously shifting side to side in a slow, steady rhythm. The hips alternately settle fully over the left and right legs while the upright torso glides laterally without any waist rotation. The arms are initially bent at the elbows with loose fists held at chest height, then periodically drop down to hang relaxed by the sides as the lateral swaying continues.
